name: Tooltip
description: Contextual hint bubble anchored to a target (Figma 541:8679, component set 388:2125): a radius-8 bubble (6/8 padding, 14px text, drop shadow 0 2 10 @10%) with a 4x16 arrowhead pointing at the target. theme picks the contrast pair — default is white on light with gray.90 text, reverse is gray.70 with gray.5 text; position puts the bubble right/left/bottom/top of the target; ordinal pins the arrow to the start/center/end of the facing edge (4px inset). The react target adds the behavior layer: hover/focus triggering with Escape to close, aria-describedby wiring, and document.body portal positioning by default (portal=false renders in place) so overflow/stacking contexts can't clip the bubble.

props.name: portal
props.description: react only: portal the bubble to document.body and pin it to the trigger (false renders in place).

props.name: open
props.description: react only: controlled visibility; omitted, hover/focus manage it.

limitations: Static bubble only: hover triggering and portal positioning need the react target or client code.
Static bubble only; triggering needs client code.
Static bubble; apps anchor and toggle it themselves.

aria: trigger aria-describedby points at the bubble while open
accessibility.focusManagement: The bubble never takes focus; it describes the trigger.
